name: Artistic Pool & Spa — North Las Vegas, NV
description: Custom pool builder serving North Las Vegas, NV. Artistic Pool & Spa has built pools throughout North Las Vegas and the surrounding valley since 1974.

mainEntity.name: How much does a custom pool cost in North Las Vegas?

acceptedAnswer.text: Custom pool costs in North Las Vegas typically range from $55,000 to $130,000+ depending on size, features, and lot conditions. Many North LV neighborhoods like Aliante and Eldorado have newer lots with generous backyard space, which often means more build flexibility. Artistic Pool & Spa has built 700+ pools across the Las Vegas valley — call us for a free, no-pressure estimate: (702) 870-6760.

mainEntity.name: How long does pool installation take in Las Vegas?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most pools take 8 to 12 weeks from permit approval to first swim. The permit process in Clark County typically adds 2 to 4 weeks before construction begins. Artistic Pool & Spa handles all permitting and keeps you updated at every stage.

mainEntity.name: Do you build pools in North Las Vegas, NV?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. North Las Vegas is one of our primary service areas. We build custom pools, spas, and outdoor living spaces throughout North Las Vegas. Contact us for a free, no-pressure consultation: (702) 870-6760.

mainEntity.name: How long has Artistic Pool & Spa been in business?

acceptedAnswer.text: Artistic Pool & Spa has served the Las Vegas valley since 1974 — over 50 years of custom pool building. We are a licensed, insured Nevada contractor with more than 700 completed projects across Las Vegas, Henderson, Summerlin, and North Las Vegas.

mainEntity.name: Do you do pool remodeling and resurfacing?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We remodel existing pools, replace pool surfaces, upgrade equipment, add water features, and retrofit older pools with energy-efficient systems. If your pool was built by someone else, we can still help.
